testcase.name: test_image_generation
testcase.failure: tests/test_aiforge_backend.py:144: in test_image_generation assert r.status_code == 200, f"Image gen failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: Image gen failed: 502 {"detail":"Generation failed: Failed to generate multimodal completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.546781, Max budget: 0.4"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_model3d_generation
testcase.failure: tests/test_aiforge_backend.py:159: in test_model3d_generation assert r.status_code == 200, f"3D gen failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: 3D gen failed: 502 {"detail":"Generation failed: Failed to generate multimodal completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.546781, Max budget: 0.4"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_chat_multiturn_session_continuity

failure.message: AssertionError: multi-turn lost context, reply: I don't have any secret code from you. This is the beginning of our conversation, and no code has been shared. Is there something I can help you with? assert ('BANANA-42' in "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?" or 'BANANA' in "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?") + where "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?" = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210>() + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210> = "I don't have any secret code from you. This is the beginning of our conversation, and no code has been shared. Is there something I can help you with?".upper + and "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?" = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210>() + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210> = "I don't have any secret code from you. This is the beginning of our conversation, and no code has been shared. Is there something I can help you with?".upper

testcase.failure: tests/test_aiforge_backend.py:221: in test_chat_multiturn_session_continuity assert "BANANA-42" in reply2.upper() or "BANANA" in reply2.upper(), f"multi-turn lost context, reply: {reply2[:200]}" E AssertionError: multi-turn lost context, reply: I don't have any secret code from you. This is the beginning of our conversation, and no code has been shared. Is there something I can help you with? E assert ('BANANA-42' in "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?" or 'BANANA' in "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?") E + where "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?" = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210>() E + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210> = "I don't have any secret code from you. This is the beginning of our conversation, and no code has been shared. Is there something I can help you with?".upper E + and "I DON'T HAVE ANY SECRET CODE FROM YOU. THIS IS THE BEGINNING OF OUR CONVERSATION, AND NO CODE HAS BEEN SHARED. IS THERE SOMETHING I CAN HELP YOU WITH?" = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210>() E + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb71448cd210> = "I don't have any secret code from you. This is the beginning of our conversation, and no code has been shared. Is there something I can help you with?".upper

testcase.name: test_stats_updated
testcase.failure: tests/test_aiforge_backend.py:267: in test_stats_updated assert data["image"] >= 1 E assert 0 >= 1

testcase.name: test_free_limit_enforced
testcase.failure: tests/test_aiforge_backend.py:292: in test_free_limit_enforced assert r.status_code == 200, f"gen {i} failed: {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: gen 1 failed: {"detail":"Chat failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.546781, Max budget: 0.4"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scad_endpoint_also_402_when_exhausted
testcase.failure: tests/test_aiforge_backend.py:308: in test_scad_endpoint_also_402_when_exhausted assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
